checks.label: articles.json contains at least one paper
QA fail verdicts are not published
published papers have no QA warnings

agentFlow.responsibility: 发现候选内容，保留来源、主题、时间和热度信号，避免只靠标题判断。
agentFlow.signal: 15 paper candidate(s) from the papers kernel

agentFlow.responsibility: 收集 README、abstract、sourceUrl、paperUrl、benchmark、版本号等证据，让分析有依据。
按岗位相关性、架构价值、实践价值、评估质量、可迁移性和新鲜度排序。
agentFlow.signal: 10 current analysis item(s) available after QA filtering

agentFlow.responsibility: 用教授视角解释该学什么、好在哪里、弱在哪里、如何迁移到自己的工作。
运行结构校验、编码校验和质量门槛，失败时不静默发布。
把通过质量门槛的小批量内容写入前端可读 JSON，保持每日 feed 决策清晰。
把未入选但有复用价值的内容和历史运行记录保存下来，后续用于架构思路和选题复盘。

mustRead.title: Your Agents Are Aging Too: Agent Lifespan Engineering for Deployed Systems
mustRead.reason: strong agent harness engineering and reliability benchmark

skim.title: From Model Scaling to System Scaling: Scaling the Harness in Agentic AI
skim.reason: Broad AI / ML, AI Agents, Tool Use; total 94; strongest signals: role_relevance, architecture_value, practicality. AHE signals: harness engineering, agent harness, trajectory. FDE signals: API/tool/MCP integration, workflow readiness, RAG/k

skim.title: Code as Agent Harness
skim.reason: High relevance to agent harness and AI engineering; strong FDE signals.

skim.title: Agentic Harness Engineering: Observability-Driven Automatic Evolution of Coding-Agent Harnesses
skim.reason: AI Agents, Tool Use, AI Coding / SWE Agents; total 100; strongest signals: role_relevance, architecture_value, practicality. AHE signals: harness engineering, agent harness, observability, trajectory, rollback, Terminal-Bench. FDE signals:

professorLesson: 该论文提出Agent Lifespan Engineering (ALE)框架和AgingBench基准，将长生命周期AI代理的可靠性问题从单点快照评估转向纵向退化测量与诊断。
goodIdeaToSteal: 核心主张：部署后的AI代理存在时间依赖的可靠性退化，且退化是多机制、多维度的，无法通过单点评估捕捉。
badIdeaOrRisk: 证据主要来自人工设计的程序化场景（7个），样本量为~400次运行。模型覆盖14个，但许多实验仅使用8-12会话，可能不足以模拟极长期部署（如数百会话）。反事实归因假设流水线组件可分离，但实际中可能相互影响。
transferablePattern: 论文通过7个场景、14个模型、多种记忆策略、约400次运行（8-200会话）的实验结果支撑该主张。具体数据见表3。
futureWorkApplication: 论文在附录I中讨论广泛影响和局限性，但具体内容未在提供的文本中详述。作者指出AgingBench的生成器不旨在建模真实用户行为的完整分布，而是提供可控的压力表面来隔离纵向失败。
architectureTakeaway: 论文通过7个场景、14个模型、多种记忆策略、约400次运行（8-200会话）的实验结果支撑该主张。具体数据见表3。
projectIdea: Build a grounded checklist from Your Agents Are Aging Too: Agent Lifespan Engineering for Deployed Systems and test it against one agent workflow.
